description: In OrientDB Studio (http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html), connect to the 'demodb' database using the server credentials (username: root, password: GymAnything123!). As the DemoDB is a travel agency database, create a new vertex class named 'Airports' that extends 'V'. Configure the class with three properties: 'Name' (String, mandatory), 'IATA_Code' (String), and 'City' (String).
